name: LAN — two machines

values.description: Default target node. Change to any node IP:port as needed.
Machine 1 — RegAuth (projId=0). Replace 192.168.1.10 with actual IP.
Machine 2 — Project node A (projId=1). Replace 192.168.1.20 with actual IP.
Machine 2 — Project node B (projId=2). Same machine as projA, different port.

_postman_notes:
Startup commands for two-machine demo:

Machine 1 (192.168.1.10):
  node index.js 3000 http://192.168.1.10:3000 0 regauth.db

Machine 2 (192.168.1.20):
  node index.js 3001 http://192.168.1.20:3001 1 proja.db http://192.168.1.10:3000
  node index.js 3002 http://192.168.1.20:3002 2 projb.db http://192.168.1.10:3000

Then run the «00 — Network Setup» folder in Postman with this environment active.
